ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Switch(
    varCalType,
    "5-Point",
        Patch(
            'Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands',
            Defaults('Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands'),
            {
                Asset: { Id: varCalAsset.ID, Value: varCalAsset.Title },
                Date: varCalDate,
                'Calibrated By': User().FullName,
                'Calibration Type': { Value: varCalType },
                'Error (% Span)': Float(varErrorPctSpan),
                'Absolute Error': Float(varAbsError),
                'LRV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.LRV, 0),
                'URV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.URV, 0),
                '0% Input': Coalesce(Value(NCIn0.Text), 0),
                '25% Input': Coalesce(Value(NCIn25.Text), 0),
                '50% Input': Coalesce(Value(NCIn50.Text), 0),
                '75% Input': Coalesce(Value(NCIn75.Text), 0),
                '100% Input': Coalesce(Value(NCIn100.Text), 0),
                '0% Rising Output': Coalesce(Value(NCRise0.Text), 0),
                '25% Rising Output': Coalesce(Value(NCRise25.Text), 0),
                '50% Rising Output': Coalesce(Value(NCRise50.Text), 0),
                '75% Rising Output': Coalesce(Value(NCRise75.Text), 0),
                '100% Rising Output': Coalesce(Value(NCRise100.Text), 0),
                '0% Falling Output': Coalesce(Value(NCFall0.Text), 0),
                '25% Falling Output': Coalesce(Value(NCFall25.Text), 0),
                '50% Falling Output': Coalesce(Value(NCFall50.Text), 0),
                '75% Falling Output': Coalesce(Value(NCFall75.Text), 0),
                '100% Falling Output': Coalesce(Value(NCFall100.Text), 0),
                Comments: NCEComments.Text,
                'Equipment Notes': NCEEquipment.Text,
                'Eq1 Serial': NCEq1Serial.Text,
                'Eq1 Cal Date': NCEq1Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cal Due': NCEq1Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cert No': NCEq1Cert.Text,
                'Eq2 Serial': NCEq2Serial.Text,
                'Eq2 Cal Date': NCEq2Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cal Due': NCEq2Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cert No': NCEq2Cert.Text
            },
            If(IsBlank(varCalStandard), {}, { 'Calibration Standard': { Value: varCalStandard } }),
            If(IsBlank(varCalProcedure), {}, { 'Calibration Procedure': { Value: varCalProcedure } })
        ),
    "2-Point",
        Patch(
            'Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands',
            Defaults('Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands'),
            {
                Asset: { Id: varCalAsset.ID, Value: varCalAsset.Title },
                Date: varCalDate,
                'Calibrated By': User().FullName,
                'Calibration Type': { Value: varCalType },
                'Absolute Error': Float(varAbsError),
                'LRV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.LRV, 0),
                'URV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.URV, 0),
                '2pt Point 1 Expected': Coalesce(Value(NC2P1Expected.Text), 0),
                '2pt Point 1 Measured': Coalesce(Value(NC2P1Measured.Text), 0),
                '2pt Point 2 Expected': Coalesce(Value(NC2P2Expected.Text), 0),
                '2pt Point 2 Measured': Coalesce(Value(NC2P2Measured.Text), 0),
                Comments: NCEComments.Text,
                'Equipment Notes': NCEEquipment.Text,
                'Eq1 Serial': NCEq1Serial.Text,
                'Eq1 Cal Date': NCEq1Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cal Due': NCEq1Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cert No': NCEq1Cert.Text,
                'Eq2 Serial': NCEq2Serial.Text,
                'Eq2 Cal Date': NCEq2Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cal Due': NCEq2Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cert No': NCEq2Cert.Text
            },
            If(IsBlank(varCalStandard), {}, { 'Calibration Standard': { Value: varCalStandard } }),
            If(IsBlank(varCalProcedure), {}, { 'Calibration Procedure': { Value: varCalProcedure } })
        ),
    "Zero Adjust",
        Patch(
            'Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands',
            Defaults('Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands'),
            {
                Asset: { Id: varCalAsset.ID, Value: varCalAsset.Title },
                Date: varCalDate,
                'Calibrated By': User().FullName,
                'Calibration Type': { Value: varCalType },
                'LRV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.LRV, 0),
                'URV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.URV, 0),
                'Zero Reading': Coalesce(Value(NCZeroReading.Text), 0),
                'Zero Adjust': 4 - Coalesce(Value(NCZeroReading.Text), 4),
                Comments: NCEComments.Text,
                'Equipment Notes': NCEEquipment.Text,
                'Eq1 Serial': NCEq1Serial.Text,
                'Eq1 Cal Date': NCEq1Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cal Due': NCEq1Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cert No': NCEq1Cert.Text,
                'Eq2 Serial': NCEq2Serial.Text,
                'Eq2 Cal Date': NCEq2Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cal Due': NCEq2Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cert No': NCEq2Cert.Text
            },
            If(IsBlank(varCalStandard), {}, { 'Calibration Standard': { Value: varCalStandard } }),
            If(IsBlank(varCalProcedure), {}, { 'Calibration Procedure': { Value: varCalProcedure } })
        ),
    "Span Adjust",
        Patch(
            'Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands',
            Defaults('Device Calibration Data List - Seal Sands'),
            {
                Asset: { Id: varCalAsset.ID, Value: varCalAsset.Title },
                Date: varCalDate,
                'Calibrated By': User().FullName,
                'Calibration Type': { Value: varCalType },
                'LRV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.LRV, 0),
                'URV At Cal': Coalesce(varCalAsset.URV, 0),
                Comments: NCEComments.Text,
                'Equipment Notes': NCEEquipment.Text,
                'Eq1 Serial': NCEq1Serial.Text,
                'Eq1 Cal Date': NCEq1Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cal Due': NCEq1Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq1 Cert No': NCEq1Cert.Text,
                'Eq2 Serial': NCEq2Serial.Text,
                'Eq2 Cal Date': NCEq2Date.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cal Due': NCEq2Due.SelectedDate,
                'Eq2 Cert No': NCEq2Cert.Text
            },
            If(IsBlank(varCalStandard), {}, { 'Calibration Standard': { Value: varCalStandard } }),
            If(IsBlank(varCalProcedure), {}, { 'Calibration Procedure': { Value: varCalProcedure } }),
            If(IsBlank(varNewLRV), {}, { 'New LRV': Value(varNewLRV) }),
            If(IsBlank(varNewURV), {}, { 'New URV': Value(varNewURV) })
        )
);
Switch(
    varCalType,
    "5-Point",
        Patch(
            'Device Calibration List - Seal Sands',
            varCalAsset,
            {
                'Calibrated Upon': varCalDate,
                'Calibrated By': User().FullName,
                'Error (% Span)': Float(varErrorPctSpan)
            }
        ),
    "2-Point",
        Patch(
            'Device Calibration List - Seal Sands',
            varCalAsset,
            {
                'Calibrated Upon': varCalDate,
                'Calibrated By': User().FullName
            }
        )
);
If(
    varCalType = "Span Adjust" && Not IsBlank(varNewLRV),
    Patch('Device Calibration List - Seal Sands', varCalAsset, { LRV: Value(varNewLRV) })
);
If(
    varCalType = "Span Adjust" && Not IsBlank(varNewURV),
    Patch('Device Calibration List - Seal Sands', varCalAsset, { URV: Value(varNewURV) })
);
Notify(
    Switch(
        varCalType,
        "Span Adjust", "Span Adjust recorded for " & varCalAsset.Title & " — new range pushed to device.",
        "Zero Adjust", "Zero Adjust recorded for " & varCalAsset.Title & " — drift " & Text(4 - Coalesce(Value(NCZeroReading.Text), 4), "+0.0000; -0.0000; 0") & " mA logged.",
        "2-Point", "2-Point cal recorded for " & varCalAsset.Title & " — max deviation " & Text(varAbsError, "0.0000"),
        "5-Point recorded for " & varCalAsset.Title & " — Error: " & Text(varErrorPctSpan, "0.000") & "% span (" & Text(varAbsError, "0.0000") & " mA abs)"
    ),
    NotificationType.Success
);
Reset(NCAssetDropdown); Reset(NCDatePicker);
Reset(NCStandardDropdown); Reset(NCProcedureDropdown);
Reset(NCIn0); Reset(NCRise0); Reset(NCFall0);
Reset(NCIn25); Reset(NCRise25); Reset(NCFall25);
Reset(NCIn50); Reset(NCRise50); Reset(NCFall50);
Reset(NCIn75); Reset(NCRise75); Reset(NCFall75);
Reset(NCIn100); Reset(NCRise100); Reset(NCFall100);
Reset(NC2P1Expected); Reset(NC2P1Measured);
Reset(NC2P2Expected); Reset(NC2P2Measured);
Reset(NCZeroReading);
Reset(NCSpanNewLRV); Reset(NCSpanNewURV);
Reset(NCEComments); Reset(NCEEquipment);
Reset(NCEq1Serial); Reset(NCEq1Date); Reset(NCEq1Due); Reset(NCEq1Cert);
Reset(NCEq2Serial); Reset(NCEq2Date); Reset(NCEq2Due); Reset(NCEq2Cert);
Set(varCalType, "");
Set(varCalAsset, Blank());
Set(varCalStandard, "");
Set(varCalProcedure, "");
Set(varPrefilledAssetTitle, "");
Set(varErrorPctSpan, 0);
Set(varAbsError, 0);
Set(varNewLRV, "");
Set(varNewURV, "");
Set(varQRTag, "");
Navigate(Home, ScreenTransition.Fade)
